heading: Mortgages on property in Alaska
label: 1748e Mortgages on property in Alaska
text: The second sentence of , as amended, relating to housing in the State of Alaska, shall not apply to mortgages insured under this subchapter on property in said State.section 1715d of this title
notes: References in Text, referred to in text, was in the original “section 214 of the National Housing Act, as amended”. Section 214 of that Act was classified originally to and to , Territories and Insular Possessions. has been omitted from the Code.Section 1715d of this titlesection 1715d of this titlesection 484d of Title 48Section 484d of Title 48
Amendments1959— substituted “State” for “Territory” in two places.Pub. L. 86–701955—Act , reenacted section without change.Aug. 11, 1955
